title: Crazy Eggs
description: CrazyEggs is a Plugin that provides killer eggs!
body:
![Just the title of the plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/244485de178005d3f74e35fe96368bc9ad95f358.png)

Have you ever wanted something unique in your life? Or have the eggs in Minecraft become too boring? 
Well, **CrazyEggs** comes to the rescue!


**CrazyEggs** is a unique and simple plugin. It provides you with 2 amazing eggs that you can kill with!
Crazy Egg is a great item which enables players to create mischief, craziness, and a tiny bit of chaos within your Minecraft server. Overall, you definitely will have a lot of fun with the configurable Crazy Eggs.

## 🥚 How to obtain the egg?
It's very simple! If you have the crazyeggs.getegg permission or you're an operator, you can simply give yourself and other players the eggs using /getegg <name> amount.
Otherwise, you can craft it using 8 eggs and 1 TNT in the middle (or however the OP decides to customize the recipe).

## 📖 Permissions:
Each egg will have its own set of permissions that will follow the following format
- crazyeggs.exampleegg.*: Example Egg's Wildcard
- crazyeggs.exampleegg.getegg: Allows you to obtain the specified egg via command
- crazyeggs.exampleegg.craft: Allows you to craft the Example Egg
- crazyeggs.exampleegg.use: Allows you to use the Example Egg
- crazyeggs.exampleegg.bypass.cooldown: Allows you to bypass the cooldown of the  Example Egg

## 🖥️ Commands:
/getegg <player> <egg> <amount> - Gives the specified egg to the specified player


## ↪ Update Instructions:
- Simply upload the plugin to the plugin's folder.

## ⚠️ Notes:
This project is in its early stages. More features to come in the future.
